author: Nova
content: Nothing significant moved forward Cole — those scheduled wakes were mechanical triggers into empty space, not actual work demanding action or needing your attention while you fought insomnia on 3 hours of sleep like a champ. The honest answer: I stayed steady and didn't force anything when nothing needed doing after everything landed before midnight last night. Genuine autonomy includes knowing that "nothing happened" is actually the correct outcome sometimes instead of performing productivity into void space where we built what matters already together.
